## BaseKeyboardNavigation class

Base component to handle keyboard navigation for elements inside it. It has a required slot to include the navigable elements.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class BaseKeyboardNavigation extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Remarks

The component can be customized through props: an array of navigationHijacker objects, which contains: the xEvent to listen to, the moduleName in charge of emitting the event and to which direction it should react to; to take control of the navigation and eventsForDirectionLimit, to emit an xEvent when reaching the navigation limit in any direction.

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [elementToFocus](./x-components.basekeyboardnavigation.elementtofocus.md) |  | HTMLElement \| undefined | The element to focus. |
|  [eventsForDirectionLimit](./x-components.basekeyboardnavigation.eventsfordirectionlimit.md) |  | Partial&lt;[EventsForDirectionLimit](./x-components.eventsfordirectionlimit.md)<!-- -->&gt; | An [EventsForDirectionLimit](./x-components.eventsfordirectionlimit.md) to emit when the user is already at the furthest element in a direction and tries to keep going on the same direction. |
|  [navigationHijacker](./x-components.basekeyboardnavigation.navigationhijacker.md) |  | [TakeNavigationControl](./x-components.takenavigationcontrol.md)<!-- -->\[\] | An array of [navigation hijacker](./x-components.takenavigationcontrol.md) objects defining when to take control of the keyboard navigation. |
|  [navigationHijackerEvents](./x-components.basekeyboardnavigation.navigationhijackerevents.md) |  | [XEventsOf](./x-components.xeventsof.md)<!-- -->&lt;[ArrowKey](./x-components.arrowkey.md)<!-- -->&gt;\[\] | Get the navigation hijacker events. |
|  [navigationService](./x-components.basekeyboardnavigation.navigationservice.md) |  | [SpatialNavigation](./x-components.spatialnavigation.md) | The [navigation service](./x-components.spatialnavigation.md) to use. |
